also the line was strangely longer than the rest of the body on my iPhone SE 2020 
like the rest of the page was nice and responsive for the tiny iPhone screen but not the header 
which had its own mind about how far to the right it is allowed to go 
also if you see the `claude-terminal.txt` file, there are some test failures 
maybe these need attention now I don't know but please review to make sure
